frozen_components: teacher LLM (used for pseudocode extraction only)
architecture.summary: A knowledge distillation framework that extracts intermediate pseudocode reasoning steps from large language models (teacher models: CodeLlama-7B, CodeQwen-7B, DeepSeek, GPT-4) and transfers them to smaller student models (Tranx, CodeT5, NatGen, SPT-Code) via multi-task learning. Information flows from teacher → pseudocode extraction → student model training on dual objectives (pseudocode generation + code generation), maintaining symmetry between reasoning and output.

biblio.title: Symmetry-Aware Code Generation: Distilling Pseudocode Reasoning for Lightweight Deployment of Large Language Models

claims.statement: CodeT5 distilled from GPT-4 achieves up to 74% improvement in Top-1 accuracy over the baseline
the approach consistently improves code generation performance across four student models distilled from four large language models
the distillation framework extracts intermediate reasoning steps, such as pseudocode, from LLMs and transfers them to smaller models

smaller models replicate the problem-solving strategies of larger models through a multi-task learning framework, which includes both pseudocode and code generation tasks, thus maintaining the symmetry between reasoning and output
